fields.name: hasItems
fields.notes: If true, buildings have an ItemModule.

fields.name: hasLiquids
fields.notes: If true, buildings have a LiquidModule.

fields.name: hasPower
fields.notes: If true, buildings have a PowerModule.

fields.name: outputsLiquid
fields.notes: Flag for determining whether this block outputs liquid somewhere; used for connections.

fields.name: consumesPower
fields.notes: Used by certain power blocks (nodes) to flag as non-consuming of power. True by default, even if this block has no power.

fields.name: outputsPower
fields.notes: If true, this block is a generator that can produce power.

fields.name: connectedPower
fields.notes: If false, power nodes cannot connect to this block.

fields.name: conductivePower
fields.notes: If true, this block can conduct power like a cable.

fields.name: outputsPayload
fields.notes: If true, this block can output payloads; affects blending.

fields.name: acceptsUnitPayloads
fields.notes: If true, this block can input payloads; affects unit payload enter behavior.

fields.name: acceptsPayload
fields.notes: If true, payloads will attempt to move into this block.

fields.name: acceptsItems
fields.notes: Visual flag use for blending of certain transportation blocks.

fields.name: alwaysAllowDeposit
fields.notes: If true, this block won't be affected by the onlyDepositCore rule.

fields.name: depositCooldown
fields.notes: Cooldown, in seconds, applied to player item depositing when any item is deposited to this block. Overrides the itemDepositCooldown if non-negative.

fields.name: separateItemCapacity
fields.notes: If true, all item capacities of this block are separate instead of pooled as one number.

fields.name: itemCapacity
fields.notes: maximum items this block can carry (usually, this is per-type of item)

fields.name: liquidCapacity
fields.notes: maximum total liquids this block can carry if hasLiquids = true. Default value is 10, scales with max liquid consumption in ConsumeLiquid

fields.name: liquidPressure
fields.notes: higher numbers increase liquid output speed; TODO remove and replace with better liquids system

fields.name: outputFacing
fields.notes: If true, this block outputs to its facing direction, when applicable. Used for blending calculations.

fields.name: noSideBlend
fields.notes: if true, this block does not accept input from the sides (used for armored conveyors)

fields.name: displayFlow
fields.notes: whether to display flow rate

fields.name: inEditor
fields.notes: whether this block is visible in the editor

fields.name: editorConfigurable
fields.notes: if true, {@link #buildEditorConfig(Table)} will be called for configuring this block in the editor.

fields.name: lastConfig
fields.notes: the last configuration value applied to this block.

fields.name: saveConfig
fields.notes: whether to save the last config and apply it to newly placed blocks

fields.name: copyConfig
fields.notes: whether to allow copying the config through middle click

fields.name: clearOnDoubleTap
fields.notes: if true, double-tapping this configurable block clears configuration.

fields.name: update
fields.notes: whether this block has a tile entity that updates

fields.name: destructible
fields.notes: whether this block has health and can be destroyed. note that setting this to false does nothing if update = true!

fields.name: unloadable
fields.notes: whether unloaders work on this block

fields.name: isDuct
fields.notes: if true, this block acts a duct and will connect to armored ducts from the side.

fields.name: allowResupply
fields.notes: whether units can resupply by taking items from this block

fields.name: solid
fields.notes: whether this is solid

fields.name: solidifes
fields.notes: whether this block CAN be solid.

fields.name: teamPassable
fields.notes: if true, this counts as a non-solid block to this team.

fields.name: underBullets
fields.notes: if true, this block cannot be hit by bullets unless explicitly targeted.

fields.name: rotate
fields.notes: whether this is rotatable

fields.name: rotateDraw
fields.notes: if rotate is true and this is false, the region won't rotate when drawing

fields.name: rotateDrawEditor
fields.notes: if rotate is true and this is false, the region won't rotate when drawing in the editor

fields.name: visualRotationOffset
fields.notes: visual rotation offset used in broken plan rendering

fields.name: lockRotation
fields.notes: if rotate = false and this is true, rotation will be locked at 0 when placing (default); advanced use only

fields.name: ignoreLineRotation
fields.notes: if true, this block won't face the line drag direction

fields.name: invertFlip
fields.notes: if true, schematic flips with this block are inverted.

fields.name: variants
fields.notes: number of different variant regions to use

fields.name: drawArrow
fields.notes: whether to draw a rotation arrow - this does not apply to lines of blocks

fields.name: drawTeamOverlay
fields.notes: whether to draw the team corner by default

fields.name: saveData
fields.notes: for static blocks only: if true, tile data() is saved in world data.

fields.name: breakable
fields.notes: whether you can break this with rightclick

fields.name: unitMoveBreakable
fields.notes: if true, this block will be broken by certain units stepping/moving over it

fields.name: rebuildable
fields.notes: whether to add this block to brokenblocks

fields.name: privileged
fields.notes: if true, this logic-related block can only be used with privileged processors (or is one itself)

fields.name: requiresWater
fields.notes: whether this block can only be placed on water

fields.name: placeableLiquid
fields.notes: whether this block can be placed on any liquids, anywhere

fields.name: placeablePlayer
fields.notes: whether this block can be placed directly by the player via PlacementFragment

fields.name: placeableOn
fields.notes: whether this floor can be placed on.

fields.name: insulated
fields.notes: whether this block has insulating properties.

fields.name: squareSprite
fields.notes: whether the sprite is a full square.

fields.name: absorbLasers
fields.notes: whether this block absorbs laser attacks.

fields.name: enableDrawStatus
fields.notes: if false, the status is never drawn

fields.name: drawDisabled
fields.notes: whether to draw disabled status

fields.name: autoResetEnabled
fields.notes: whether to automatically reset enabled status after a logic block has not interacted for a while.

fields.name: noUpdateDisabled
fields.notes: if true, the block stops updating when disabled

fields.name: updateInUnits
fields.notes: if true, this block updates when it's a payload in a unit.

fields.name: alwaysUpdateInUnits
fields.notes: if true, this block updates in payloads in units regardless of the experimental game rule

fields.name: canPickup
fields.notes: if true, this block can be picked up in payloads

fields.name: deconstructDropAllLiquid
fields.notes: if false, only incinerable liquids are dropped when deconstructing; otherwise, all liquids are dropped.

fields.name: useColor
fields.notes: Whether to use this block's color in the minimap. Only used for overlays.

fields.name: itemDrop
fields.notes: item that drops from this block, used for drills

fields.name: playerUnmineable
fields.notes: if true, this block cannot be mined by players. useful for annoying things like sand.

fields.name: attributes
fields.notes: Array of affinities to certain things.

fields.name: scaledHealth
fields.notes: Health per square tile that this block occupies; essentially, this is multiplied by size * size. Overridden if health is > 0. If <0, the default is 40.

fields.name: health
fields.notes: building health; -1 to use scaledHealth

fields.name: armor
fields.notes: damage absorption, similar to unit armor

fields.name: baseExplosiveness
fields.notes: base block explosiveness

fields.name: explosivenessScale
fields.notes: scaling of explosiveness based on items/liquids

fields.name: flammabilityScale
fields.notes: scaling of explosion flammability based on items/liquids

fields.name: baseShake
fields.notes: base value for screen shake upon destruction

fields.name: destroyBullet
fields.notes: bullet that this block spawns when destroyed

fields.name: destroyBulletSameTeam
fields.notes: if true, destroyBullet is spawned on the block's team instead of Derelict team

fields.name: lightLiquid
fields.notes: liquid used for lighting

fields.name: drawCracks
fields.notes: whether cracks are drawn when this block is damaged

fields.name: createRubble
fields.notes: whether rubble is created when this block is destroyed

fields.name: floating
fields.notes: whether this block can be placed on edges of liquids.

fields.name: size
fields.notes: multiblock size

fields.name: offset
fields.notes: multiblock offset

fields.name: sizeOffset
fields.notes: offset for iteration (internal use only)

fields.name: clipSize
fields.notes: Clipping size of this block. Should be as large as the block will draw.

fields.name: lightClipSize
fields.notes: Clipping size for lights only.

fields.name: placeOverlapRange
fields.notes: When placeRangeCheck is enabled, this is the range checked for enemy blocks.

fields.name: crushDamageMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplier of damage dealt to this block by tanks. Does not apply to crawlers.

fields.name: crushFragile
fields.notes: If true, this block is instantly destroyed by tanks with crushFragile set to true.

fields.name: timers
fields.notes: Max of timers used.

fields.name: cacheLayer
fields.notes: Cache layer. Only used for 'cached' rendering.

fields.name: fillsTile
fields.notes: Special flag; if false, floor will be drawn under this block even if it is cached.

fields.name: forceDark
fields.notes: If true, this block can be covered by darkness / fog even if synthetic.

fields.name: alwaysReplace
fields.notes: whether this block can be replaced in all cases

fields.name: replaceable
fields.notes: if false, this block can never be replaced.

fields.name: group
fields.notes: The block group. Unless {@link #canReplace} is overridden, blocks in the same group can replace each other.

fields.name: flags
fields.notes: List of block flags. Used for AI indexing.

fields.name: priority
fields.notes: Targeting priority of this block, as seen by enemies.

fields.name: unitCapModifier
fields.notes: How much this block affects the unit cap by. The block flags must contain unitModifier in order for this to work.

fields.name: configurable
fields.notes: Whether the block can be tapped and selected to configure.

fields.name: configureSound
fields.notes: Sound played when this block is configured.

fields.name: ignoreResizeConfig
fields.notes: If true, this block does not have pointConfig with a transform called on map resize.

fields.name: commandable
fields.notes: If true, this building can be selected like a unit when commanding.

fields.name: allowConfigInventory
fields.notes: If true, the building inventory can be shown with the config.

fields.name: selectionRows
fields.notes: Defines how large selection menus, such as that of sorters, should be.

fields.name: selectionColumns
fields.notes: Defines how large selection menus, such as that of sorters, should be.

fields.name: logicConfigurable
fields.notes: If true, this block can be configured by logic.

fields.name: delayLandingConfig
fields.notes: If true, configuration is delayed when playing the landing block buildup animation. This may be removed in the future!

fields.name: consumesTap
fields.notes: Whether this block consumes touchDown events when tapped.

fields.name: drawLiquidLight
fields.notes: Whether to draw the glow of the liquid for this block, if it has one.

fields.name: envRequired
fields.notes: Environmental flags that are all required for this block to function. 0 = any environment

fields.name: envEnabled
fields.notes: The environment flags that this block can function in. If the env matches any of these, it will be enabled.

fields.name: envDisabled
fields.notes: The environment flags that this block cannot function in. If the env matches any of these, it will be disabled.

fields.name: sync
fields.notes: Whether to periodically sync this block across the network.

fields.name: conveyorPlacement
fields.notes: Whether this block uses conveyor-type placement mode.

fields.name: allowDiagonal
fields.notes: If false, diagonal placement (ctrl) for this block is not allowed.

fields.name: swapDiagonalPlacement
fields.notes: Whether to swap the diagonal placement modes.

fields.name: allowRectanglePlacement
fields.notes: Whether to allow rectangular placement, as opposed to a line.

fields.name: schematicPriority
fields.notes: Build queue priority in schematics.

fields.name: mapColor
fields.notes: The color of this block when displayed on the minimap or map preview. Do not set manually! This is overridden when loading for most blocks.

fields.name: hasColor
fields.notes: Whether this block has a minimap color.

fields.name: targetable
fields.notes: Whether units target this block.

fields.name: attacks
fields.notes: If true, this block attacks and is considered a turret in the indexer. Building must implement Ranged.

fields.name: suppressable
fields.notes: If true, this block is mending-related and can be suppressed with special units/missiles.

fields.name: canOverdrive
fields.notes: Whether the overdrive core has any effect on this block.

fields.name: outlineColor
fields.notes: Outlined icon color.

fields.name: outlineIcon
fields.notes: Whether any icon region has an outline added.

fields.name: outlineRadius
fields.notes: Outline icon radius.

fields.name: outlinedIcon
fields.notes: Which of the icon regions gets the outline added. Uses last icon if <= 0.

fields.name: hasShadow
fields.notes: Whether this block has a shadow under it.

fields.name: customShadow
fields.notes: If true, a custom shadow (name-shadow) is drawn under this block.

fields.name: placePitchChange
fields.notes: Should the sound made when this block is built change in pitch.

fields.name: breakPitchChange
fields.notes: Should the sound made when this block is deconstructed change in pitch.

fields.name: placeSound
fields.notes: Sound made when this block is built.

fields.name: breakSound
fields.notes: Sound made when this block is deconstructed.

fields.name: destroySound
fields.notes: Sounds made when this block is destroyed.

fields.name: destroySoundVolume
fields.notes: Volume of destruction sound.

fields.name: destroyPitchMin
fields.notes: Range of destroy sound.

fields.name: destroyPitchMax
fields.notes: Range of destroy sound.

fields.name: albedo
fields.notes: How reflective this block is.

fields.name: lightColor
fields.notes: Environmental passive light color.

fields.name: emitLight
fields.notes: If true, drawLight() will be called for this block.

fields.name: obstructsLight
fields.notes: If true, this block obstructs light emitted by other blocks.

fields.name: lightRadius
fields.notes: Radius of the light emitted by this block.

fields.name: fogRadius
fields.notes: How much fog this block uncovers, in tiles. Cannot be dynamic. <= 0 to disable.

fields.name: ambientSound
fields.notes: The sound that this block makes while idle. Uses one sound loop for all blocks.

fields.name: ambientSoundVolume
fields.notes: Idle sound base volume.

fields.name: requirements
fields.notes: Cost of constructing this block.

fields.name: category
fields.notes: Category in place menu.

fields.name: buildTime
fields.notes: Time to build this block in ticks. If this value is <0, it is calculated dynamically.

fields.name: buildVisibility
fields.notes: Whether this block is visible and can currently be built.

fields.name: buildCostMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplier for speed of building this block.

fields.name: deconstructThreshold
fields.notes: Build completion at which deconstruction finishes.

fields.name: instantDeconstruct
fields.notes: If true, this block deconstructs immediately. Instant deconstruction implies no resource refund.

fields.name: instantBuild
fields.notes: If true, this block constructs immediately. This implies no resource requirement, and ignores configs - do not use, this is for performance only!

fields.name: ignoreBuildDarkness
fields.notes: If true, this block can be placed even in "dark" areas. Only used for editor static walls.

fields.name: placeEffect
fields.notes: Effect for placing the block. Passes size as rotation.

fields.name: breakEffect
fields.notes: Effect for breaking the block. Passes size as rotation.

fields.name: destroyEffect
fields.notes: Effect for destroying the block.

fields.name: researchCostMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplier for cost of research in tech tree.

fields.name: researchCostMultipliers
fields.notes: Cost multipliers per-item.

fields.name: researchCost
fields.notes: Override for research cost. Uses multipliers above and building requirements if not set.

fields.name: forceTeam
fields.notes: If set, all blocks will be forced to be this team.

fields.name: instantTransfer
fields.notes: Whether this block has instant transfer.

fields.name: quickRotate
fields.notes: Whether you can rotate this block after it is placed.

fields.name: allowDerelictRepair
fields.notes: If true, this derelict block can be repair by clicking it.

fields.name: subclass
fields.notes: Main subclass. Non-anonymous.

fields.name: selectScroll
fields.notes: Scroll position for certain blocks.

fields.name: buildType
fields.notes: Building that is created for this block. Initialized in init() via reflection. Set manually if modded.

fields.name: configurations
fields.notes: Configuration handlers by type.

fields.name: itemFilter
fields.notes: Consumption filters.

fields.name: liquidFilter
fields.notes: Consumption filters.

fields.name: consumers
fields.notes: Array of consumers used by this block. Only populated after init().

fields.name: optionalConsumers
fields.notes: Array of consumers used by this block. Only populated after init().

fields.name: nonOptionalConsumers
fields.notes: Array of consumers used by this block. Only populated after init().

fields.name: updateConsumers
fields.notes: Array of consumers used by this block. Only populated after init().

fields.name: hasConsumers
fields.notes: Set to true if this block has any consumers in its array.

fields.name: consPower
fields.notes: The single power consumer, if applicable.

fields.name: regionRotated1
fields.notes: Regions indexes from icons() that are rotated. If either of these is not -1, other regions won't be rotated in ConstructBlocks.

fields.name: regionRotated2
fields.notes: Regions indexes from icons() that are rotated. If either of these is not -1, other regions won't be rotated in ConstructBlocks.

fields.name: dumpTime
fields.notes: How often to try dumping items in ticks, e.g. 5 = 12 times/sec
